name: Classic Aviator Sunglasses
description: Timeless aviator sunglasses designed for everyday style and comfort. Provides full UV protection to keep your eyes safe under harsh sunlight. Lightweight frame ensures a secure fit for long hours of wear.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: High-performance sunscreen lotion with SPF 50 for maximum protection. Water-resistant formula makes it ideal for beach and outdoor use. Helps prevent sunburn while keeping your skin hydrated and smooth.

name: Beach Straw Hat
description: Stylish wide-brim straw hat perfect for sunny beach days. Provides excellent shade and protection from direct sunlight. Lightweight and breathable design keeps you cool and comfortable.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Elegant floral dress crafted for warm summer days. Made from lightweight fabric that feels soft against the skin. Perfect for casual outings, beach trips, or daytime events.

name: Beach Towel Set
description: Soft and absorbent beach towel set designed for comfort. Quick-drying fabric makes it ideal for repeated use. Comes in a set of two, perfect for sharing or extra convenience.

name: Tropical Swim Shorts
description: Trendy swim shorts featuring a vibrant tropical print. Quick-dry material ensures comfort both in and out of water. Elastic waistband provides a secure and adjustable fit.

name: Polarized Sport Sunglasses
description: High-performance sunglasses built for active lifestyles. Polarized lenses reduce glare and enhance visual clarity. Durable frame ensures long-lasting use during outdoor activities.

name: Hydrating Face Mist
description: Refreshing face mist enriched with natural ingredients. Helps hydrate and revitalize tired or dry skin instantly. Perfect for daily use, especially during hot summer days.

name: Waterproof Beach Bag
description: Spacious beach bag designed to carry all your essentials. Waterproof material keeps your belongings safe and dry. Durable and stylish design makes it perfect for travel and beach trips.
